cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: 腰背痛这两天特别明显，想先来做个评估，你们还能安排吗？

mustInclude: anchor the reply in body area and timing
guide toward a clear next step without overselling
mustAvoid: pretending the exact route is already fixed

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: 下周手术后想做康复，这两天有时间沟通计划吗？

mustInclude: recognize it as a serious booking inquiry
ask for date, body area, and rehab scope
mustAvoid: assuming every rehab plan is the same

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: 康复会不会很痛？我有点担心治疗师和方案。

mustInclude: move toward issue-specific and evidence-based clarification

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: 这周内能不能先做一次康复评估？有点急。

mustInclude: state that availability depends on schedule and rehab issue
guide toward the safest next step
